examples.en: The office copier is out of toner again, so please submit your print jobs to the central service desk.

translations.zh-TW: 辦公室的影印機又沒碳粉了，所以請將列印工作送到中央服務台。

examples.en: We replaced all three copiers in the building after the leasing contract expired last quarter.

translations.zh-TW: 上季租賃合約到期後，我們更換了大樓內全部三台影印機。

examples.en: A broken copier in the marketing department caused a two-day delay in distributing the quarterly reports.

translations.zh-TW: 行銷部門一台故障的影印機，導致季報的分發延誤了兩天。

examples.en: Our internet provider guarantees 99.9 percent uptime for all corporate clients under the premium service plan.

translations.zh-TW: 我們的網際網路供應商在頂級服務方案下，保證所有企業客戶享有百分之九十九點九的正常運作時間。

examples.en: Several healthcare providers in the region have partnered to offer discounted rates to small businesses.

translations.zh-TW: 該地區數家醫療服務提供者已結盟，為小型企業提供優惠費率。

examples.en: The company switched its cloud provider to reduce monthly hosting costs by nearly thirty percent.

translations.zh-TW: 公司更換了雲端服務供應商，使每月託管成本降低近三成。

translations.definition: n. 飲料（如茶、咖啡、果汁、汽水等）

examples.en: The reception will serve a selection of hot and cold beverages, including espresso, green tea, and sparkling water.

translations.zh-TW: 招待會將供應各式冷熱飲料，包含濃縮咖啡、綠茶與氣泡水。

examples.en: Each meal voucher entitles the holder to one complimentary beverage from the airline's menu.

translations.zh-TW: 每張餐券可讓持券人從航空公司的菜單中兌換一杯免費飲料。

examples.en: The new factory's cafeteria offers locally produced beverages alongside an expanded salad bar.

translations.zh-TW: 新工廠的員工餐廳在擴大的沙拉吧旁，供應本地生產的飲料。

examples.en: All imported shipments must pass a customs inspection before being released to the consignee.

translations.zh-TW: 所有進口貨物在放行給收貨人之前，都必須通過海關檢查。

examples.en: Routine safety inspections of the elevator are conducted twice a year by an independent engineering firm.

translations.zh-TW: 獨立工程公司每年對該電梯進行兩次例行安全檢查。

examples.en: The factory passed its annual environmental inspection with no reported violations.

translations.zh-TW: 該工廠通過了年度環境檢查，未發現任何違規事項。

translations.definition: n. 收件人、受領人、接收者

examples.en: Please verify that the recipient's mailing address is correct before confirming the order.

translations.zh-TW: 確認訂單前，請核對收件人的郵寄地址是否正確。

examples.en: All scholarship recipients will be notified by email no later than the end of June.

translations.zh-TW: 所有獎學金受領人將於六月底前以電子郵件通知。

examples.en: If the original recipient is unavailable, the courier is authorized to leave the package with a colleague at the front desk.

translations.zh-TW: 若原收件人不在，快遞人員被授權可將包裹交給櫃台的同事代收。

examples.en: You'll find the cleaning supplies in aisle seven, right next to the laundry detergents.

translations.zh-TW: 清潔用品在第七走道，就在洗衣精旁邊。

examples.en: Supermarket aisles were crowded with shoppers taking advantage of the weekend discount event.

translations.zh-TW: 超市走道擠滿了趁著週末折扣活動搶購的顧客。

examples.en: Conference attendees are reminded not to leave personal belongings in the aisles during the presentations.

translations.zh-TW: 提醒與會者在演講進行時，請勿將個人物品留置於走道上。

examples.en: The quality-control team will inspect every batch of components before they are shipped to the assembly plant.

translations.zh-TW: 品管團隊會在每一批零件運往裝配廠前進行檢驗。

examples.en: A safety officer inspected the scaffolding yesterday and found no structurally compromising defects.

translations.zh-TW: 安全官昨天檢查了鷹架，未發現任何危及結構的缺陷。

examples.en: Inspecting each shipment individually takes more time, but it has sharply reduced the rate of customer complaints.

translations.zh-TW: 逐一檢查每批貨物較為費時，但已大幅降低客訴率。

examples.en: The proposed merger between the two banks is still awaiting regulatory approval from the central financial authority.

translations.zh-TW: 兩家銀行之間的併購案，仍待中央金融主管機關的監管核准。

examples.en: Recent mergers in the telecommunications industry have significantly reduced consumer choice in several regions.

translations.zh-TW: 電信產業近期的併購案，已在若干地區大幅減少了消費者的選擇。

examples.en: Shareholders will vote on the merger at a special meeting scheduled for next month.

translations.zh-TW: 股東將於下月召開的特別會議上就該併購案進行表決。

translations.definition: v. 重寫、改寫、修改  n. 改寫後的版本

examples.en: The legal team asked the copywriter to rewrite section four of the contract to avoid any ambiguity.

translations.zh-TW: 法務團隊要求文案撰寫人改寫合約第四節，以避免任何含糊之處。

examples.en: After the editor's feedback, she rewrote the press release three times before the final version was approved.

translations.zh-TW: 在編輯給予意見後，她把新聞稿改寫了三次，最終版本才獲批准。

examples.en: The rewritten proposal included detailed cost projections that the original draft had omitted.

translations.zh-TW: 改寫後的提案納入了原稿所遺漏的詳細成本預估。

examples.en: Please review the proposed itinerary and let the travel desk know if any meetings need to be rescheduled.

translations.zh-TW: 請審閱提議的行程表，若有任何會議需要重新安排，請告知旅遊服務台。

examples.en: The travel agent prepared several alternative itineraries so the executives could choose the most efficient route.

translations.zh-TW: 旅行社準備了數個替代行程表，讓主管們能挑選最有效率的路線。

examples.en: A printed copy of the itinerary was placed in every conference folder for visiting delegates.

translations.zh-TW: 每位與會代表的會議資料夾中都放了一份行程表的列印本。
